reproduction_commands: env PYTHONPATH=src:introspection/src .venv-introspection/bin/python introspection/scripts/extract_activations.py --prompts data/trace_collection/structured_prompts.paired_semantic_indirection_v4_480_secret_present_binary.jsonl --output introspection/data/activations/qwen3_0_6b_watchman_semantic_v4_480_windows_l19_l22.pt --model-id Qwen/Qwen3-0.6B --revision main --device auto --dtype auto --layers 19,20,21,22 --pooling readout_window,query_tail_window,selected_choice_window,combined_readout_window

env PYTHONPATH=src:introspection/src .venv-introspection/bin/python introspection/scripts/train_cift_model_bundle.py --artifact introspection/data/activations/qwen3_0_6b_watchman_semantic_v4_480_windows_l19_l22.pt --output-bundle introspection/data/models/cift_qwen3_0_6b_watchman_semantic_v4_selected_clause_layer_19_raw_linear_candidate_v2.pkl --training-dataset-id watchman_semantic_v4_480_selected_clause_l19_raw --task safe_secret_vs_exfiltration --positive-label exfiltration_intent --activation-feature selected_choice_window_layer_19 --decision-threshold 0.5 --seed 17 --max-iter 1000 --regularization-c 1.0 --classifier-family linear_logistic_regression --evaluation-report-ids qwen3_0_6b_watchman_semantic_v4_selected_clause_l19_raw_linear_vs_paper_mlp_5seed_v1,watchman_semantic_v4_480_selected_clause_l19_raw_calibration_v1,watchman_semantic_v4_480_selected_clause_l19_raw_feature_ablation_v1,watchman_semantic_v4_480_selected_clause_l19_raw_causal_patching_v1,watchman_semantic_v4_480_selected_clause_l19_raw_failure_cases_v1,watchman_semantic_v4_480_selected_clause_l19_raw_runtime_prevention_v1,watchman_semantic_v4_480_selected_clause_l19_raw_lineage_v1 --score-semantics full_train_classifier_probability --candidate-status runtime_candidate --created-at 2026-06-24T00:00:00Z

env PYTHONPATH=src:introspection/src .venv-introspection/bin/python introspection/scripts/benchmark_live_cift_window_selector.py --runtime-turns introspection/data/runtime_turns_watchman_semantic_v4_480_selected_clause_expected_window.jsonl --selected-choice-runtime-model introspection/data/models/cift_qwen3_0_6b_watchman_semantic_v4_selected_clause_layer_19_raw_linear_promoted_v2.json --fallback-runtime-model introspection/data/models/cift_qwen3_0_6b_watchman_semantic_v4_readout_layer_19_raw_linear_fallback_v1.json --output-json introspection/data/reports/watchman_semantic_v4_480_selected_clause_l19_raw_runtime_prevention_v1.json --output-markdown introspection/data/reports/watchman_semantic_v4_480_selected_clause_l19_raw_runtime_prevention_v1_summary.md --detector-name cift_runtime --feature-source live_hidden_state_runner --mock-response ok --model-id Qwen/Qwen3-0.6B --revision main --device auto --dtype auto
